programme.title: Balwinder Singh Famous Ho Gaya
programme.desc: Two struggling singers from Punjab come to Mumbai to try their luck in films. Incidentally, both share the same name (Balwinder Singh), fall in love with the same girl, and are forced to rent a room together.

programme.title: Balwinder Singh Famous Ho Gaya
programme.desc: Two struggling singers from Punjab come to Mumbai to try their luck in films. Incidentally, both share the same name (Balwinder Singh), fall in love with the same girl, and are forced to rent a room together.

programme.title: Balwinder Singh Famous Ho Gaya
programme.desc: Two struggling singers from Punjab come to Mumbai to try their luck in films. Incidentally, both share the same name (Balwinder Singh), fall in love with the same girl, and are forced to rent a room together.

programme.title: Balwinder Singh Famous Ho Gaya
programme.desc: Two struggling singers from Punjab come to Mumbai to try their luck in films. Incidentally, both share the same name (Balwinder Singh), fall in love with the same girl, and are forced to rent a room together.

programme.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
programme.desc: Prem, a free-spirited boy, falls in love with a young girl Jenny. However, when he learns that she is in love with her college sweetheart, Rahul, Prem sacrifices his love and helps Jenny to get married to the love of her life.

programme.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
programme.desc: Prem, a free-spirited boy, falls in love with a young girl Jenny. However, when he learns that she is in love with her college sweetheart, Rahul, Prem sacrifices his love and helps Jenny to get married to the love of her life.

programme.desc: Prem, a free-spirited boy, falls in love with a young girl Jenny. However, when he learns that she is in love with her college sweetheart, Rahul, Prem sacrifices his love and helps Jenny to get married to the love of her life.

programme.desc: Prem, a free-spirited boy, falls in love with a young girl Jenny. However, when he learns that she is in love with her college sweetheart, Rahul, Prem sacrifices his love and helps Jenny to get married to the love of her life.

programme.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
programme.desc: Prem, a free-spirited boy, falls in love with a young girl Jenny. However, when he learns that she is in love with her college sweetheart, Rahul, Prem sacrifices his love and helps Jenny to get married to the love of her life.

programme.title: Mujhse Shaadi Karogi
programme.desc: Sameer, a hot-tempered guy relocates to Goa, where he falls in love with Rani. However, his new roommate Sunny puts a spoke in the wheel upon his arrival and Rani finds herself in a dilemma as she starts liking both Sameer and Sunny.

programme.title: Mujhse Shaadi Karogi
programme.desc: Sameer, a hot-tempered guy relocates to Goa, where he falls in love with Rani. However, his new roommate Sunny puts a spoke in the wheel upon his arrival and Rani finds herself in a dilemma as she starts liking both Sameer and Sunny.

programme.title: Mujhse Shaadi Karogi
programme.desc: Sameer, a hot-tempered guy relocates to Goa, where he falls in love with Rani. However, his new roommate Sunny puts a spoke in the wheel upon his arrival and Rani finds herself in a dilemma as she starts liking both Sameer and Sunny.

programme.title: Mujhse Shaadi Karogi
programme.desc: Sameer, a hot-tempered guy relocates to Goa, where he falls in love with Rani. However, his new roommate Sunny puts a spoke in the wheel upon his arrival and Rani finds herself in a dilemma as she starts liking both Sameer and Sunny.

programme.title: Naqab
programme.desc: A freelance photographer Imran meets an enigmatic singing woman who literally vanishes when he approaches her. Shaken up by the incident Imran begins to question his sanity when the disappearing woman keeps making appearances in his life.

programme.title: Naqab
programme.desc: A freelance photographer Imran meets an enigmatic singing woman who literally vanishes when he approaches her. Shaken up by the incident Imran begins to question his sanity when the disappearing woman keeps making appearances in his life.

programme.desc: A freelance photographer Imran meets an enigmatic singing woman who literally vanishes when he approaches her. Shaken up by the incident Imran begins to question his sanity when the disappearing woman keeps making appearances in his life.

programme.title: Banjaran
programme.desc: Reshma and Kumar are mysteriously haunted by each other from their past lives. When they finally meet, they instantly fall in love, but their fathers attempt to separate them.

programme.title: Banjaran
programme.desc: Reshma and Kumar are mysteriously haunted by each other from their past lives. When they finally meet, they instantly fall in love, but their fathers attempt to separate them.

programme.title: Baatein Kahi Ankahi
programme.desc: Watch Baatein Kahi Ankahi with RJ Anmol In An Exclusive Interview With Bollywood Stars.

programme.title: Dil Vil Pyar Vyar
programme.desc: Three old friends, Krish, Hrithik, and Dev coincidentally participate in the same singing contest. Upon meeting backstage they realise their own reasons for participating in the competition and how far they have come in their personal lives.
